---
title: "ForecastActualComparison"
author: "Maeve Gualtieri-Reed"
date: "2026-04-22"
output: pdf_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Introduction

# Exploratory Analysis

## Set up
```{r}
library(here)
library(tseries)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(cowplot)
library(forecast)
library(gt)
library(readxl)
```


## Load in Data
```{r}
#load in data

raw_Std <- read.csv(file="./data/processed/Std_household_load.csv",
                            header=TRUE) %>%
  mutate(datetime = ymd_hms(datetime_utc, tz = "UTC")) %>% 
  mutate(cluster = as.character(cluster)) %>% 
  select("datetime","cluster","load_kwh") %>% 
  mutate(cluster = paste("Std",cluster))


raw_ToU <- read.csv(file="./data/processed/ToU_household_load.csv",
                            header=TRUE) %>%
  mutate(datetime = ymd_hms(datetime_utc, tz = "UTC")) %>% 
  mutate(cluster = as.character(cluster)) %>% 
  select("datetime","cluster","load_kwh") %>% 
  mutate(cluster = paste("ToU",cluster))

tariff_raw <- read_xlsx(path="./data/raw/Tariffs.xlsx") %>% 
   mutate(
    date = as.Date(TariffDateTime),         
    hour = hour(TariffDateTime),            
    minute = minute(TariffDateTime)         
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    datehour = floor_date(TariffDateTime, unit = "hour")
  ) %>% 
  select("datehour","minute","Tariff") %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = minute,
    values_from = Tariff
  ) %>% 
  rename("Min0" = `0`, "Min30" = `30`) %>% 
  mutate(
    HourRate = case_when(
      (Min0 == "High" & Min30 != "Low") | (Min30 == "High" & Min0 != "Low") ~ "High",
      (Min0 == "Low" & Min30 != "High") | (Min30 == "Low" & Min0 != "High") ~ "Low",
      TRUE ~ "Normal"
    )
  ) %>% 
  select("datehour","HourRate") %>% 
  mutate(HourRate = factor(HourRate,
                      levels = c("Low", "Normal", "High"),
                      ordered = TRUE)) %>% 
  mutate(HourRateLevel = as.numeric(HourRate))
```

## Process Data
```{r}
processed_Std_2012 <- raw_Std %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = cluster,
              values_from = load_kwh) %>% 
  select("datetime","Std 1","Std 2") %>% 
  filter(year(datetime) == 2012)

processed_ToU_2012 <- raw_ToU %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = cluster,
              values_from = load_kwh) %>% 
  select("datetime","ToU 1","ToU 2") %>% 
  filter(year(datetime) == 2012)

processed_Std_2013 <- raw_Std %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = cluster,
              values_from = load_kwh) %>% 
  select("datetime","Std 1","Std 2") %>% 
  filter(year(datetime) == 2013)

processed_ToU_2013 <- raw_ToU %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = cluster,
              values_from = load_kwh) %>% 
  select("datetime","ToU 1","ToU 2") %>% 
  filter(year(datetime) == 2013)
```

## Convert to TS
```{r}
#2012
ts_Std1_2012 <- msts(processed_Std_2012$`Std 1`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2012,1,0)) 

ts_Std2_2012 <- msts(processed_Std_2012$`Std 2`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2012,1,0)) 

ts_ToU1_2012 <- msts(processed_ToU_2012$`ToU 1`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2012,1,0)) 

ts_ToU2_2012 <- msts(processed_ToU_2012$`ToU 2`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2012,1,0)) 

#2013

ts_Std1_2013 <- msts(processed_Std_2013$`Std 1`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2013,1,0)) 

ts_Std2_2013 <- msts(processed_Std_2013$`Std 2`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2013,1,0)) 

ts_ToU1_2013 <- msts(processed_ToU_2013$`ToU 1`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2013,1,0)) 

ts_ToU2_2013 <- msts(processed_ToU_2013$`ToU 2`, 
                            seasonal.periods =c(24,168,8766),
                            start=c(2013,1,0))
```


# Model Fitting

```{r}
#Std1
ARIMA_Std1 <- auto.arima(ts_Std1_2012, seasonal=FALSE, lambda=0,
                             xreg=fourier(ts_Std1_2012,  K=c(5,3,1)))

ARIMA_Std1_forecast <- forecast(ARIMA_Std1,
                           xreg=fourier(ts_Std1_2012, K=c(5,3,1),h=8760), h=8760) 

ARIMA_Std1_plot <- autoplot(ts_Std1_2013) +
  autolayer(ARIMA_Std1_forecast, series="ARIMA_FOURIER",PI=FALSE) +
  ylab("Load (kWh)") + labs(title="Forecast vs Actual Std1")

#Std2
ARIMA_Std2 <- auto.arima(ts_Std2_2012, seasonal=FALSE, lambda=0,
                             xreg=fourier(ts_Std2_2012,  K=c(5,3,1)))

ARIMA_Std2_forecast <- forecast(ARIMA_Std2,
                           xreg=fourier(ts_Std2_2012, K=c(5,3,1),h=8760), h=8760) 

ARIMA_Std2_plot <- autoplot(ts_Std2_2013) +
  autolayer(ARIMA_Std2_forecast, series="ARIMA_FOURIER",PI=FALSE) +
  ylab("Load (kWh)") + labs(title="Forecast vs Actual Std2")

#ToU1
ARIMA_ToU1 <- auto.arima(ts_ToU1_2012, seasonal=FALSE, lambda=0,
                             xreg=fourier(ts_ToU1_2012,  K=c(5,3,1)))

ARIMA_ToU1_forecast <- forecast(ARIMA_ToU1,
                           xreg=fourier(ts_ToU1_2012, K=c(5,3,1),h=8760), h=8760) 

ARIMA_ToU1_plot <- autoplot(ts_ToU1_2013) +
  autolayer(ARIMA_ToU1_forecast, series="ARIMA_FOURIER",PI=FALSE) +
  ylab("Load (kWh)") + labs(title="Forecast vs Actual ToU1")

#ToU2
ARIMA_ToU2 <- auto.arima(ts_ToU2_2012, seasonal=FALSE, lambda=0,
                             xreg=fourier(ts_ToU2_2012,  K=c(5,3,1)))

ARIMA_ToU2_forecast <- forecast(ARIMA_ToU2,
                           xreg=fourier(ts_ToU2_2012, K=c(5,3,1),h=8760), h=8760) 

ARIMA_ToU2_plot <- autoplot(ts_ToU2_2013) +
  autolayer(ARIMA_ToU2_forecast, series="ARIMA_FOURIER",PI=FALSE) +
  ylab("Load (kWh)") + labs(title="Forecast vs Actual ToU2")
```

```{r}

```


# Analysis

```{r}
forecast_Std1 <- ARIMA_Std1_forecast$mean
actual_Std1 <- processed_Std_2013$`Std 1`

tariff_Std1 <- cbind(tariff_raw, forecast_Std1, actual_Std1) %>% 
  mutate(forecast = as.numeric(forecast_Std1))

forecast_Std2 <- ARIMA_Std2_forecast$mean
actual_Std2 <- processed_Std_2013$`Std 2`

tariff_Std2 <- cbind(tariff_raw, forecast_Std2, actual_Std2) %>% 
  mutate(forecast = as.numeric(forecast_Std2))

forecast_ToU1 <- ARIMA_ToU1_forecast$mean
actual_ToU1 <- processed_ToU_2013$`ToU 1`

tariff_ToU1 <- cbind(tariff_raw, forecast_ToU1, actual_ToU1) %>% 
  mutate(forecast = as.numeric(forecast_ToU1))

forecast_ToU2 <- ARIMA_ToU2_forecast$mean
actual_ToU2 <- processed_ToU_2013$`ToU 2`

tariff_ToU2 <- cbind(tariff_raw, forecast_ToU2, actual_ToU2) %>% 
  mutate(forecast = as.numeric(forecast_ToU2))

```

```{r}

#High

tariff_comp_Std1_high <- tariff_Std1 %>% 
  filter(HourRate == "High") %>% 
  mutate(forecast_actual = forecast_Std1-actual_Std1) %>% 
  filter(forecast_actual > -1) # remove outliers

tariff_comp_Std2_high <- tariff_Std2 %>% 
  filter(HourRate == "High") %>% 
  mutate(forecast_actual = forecast_Std2-actual_Std2)

tariff_comp_ToU1_high <- tariff_ToU1 %>% 
  filter(HourRate == "High") %>% 
  mutate(forecast_actual = forecast_ToU1-actual_ToU1)

tariff_comp_ToU2_high <- tariff_ToU2 %>% 
  filter(HourRate == "High") %>% 
  mutate(forecast_actual = forecast_ToU2-actual_ToU2)

ggplot() +
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_Std1_high,
               aes(x = forecast_actual, color = "Std1"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_Std2_high,
               aes(x = forecast_actual, color = "Std2"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_ToU1_high,
               aes(x = forecast_actual, color = "ToU1"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_ToU2_high,
               aes(x = forecast_actual, color = "ToU2"), alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Tariff Type",
    values = c(
      "Std1" = "goldenrod1",
      "Std2" = "red",
      "ToU1" = "darkgreen",
      "ToU2" = "blue"
    )
  )+
  xlab("Forecasted - Actual Demand")+
  ggtitle("Forecasted Versus Actual Demand During High Tariff Hours, 2013")

```

```{r}
#Low

tariff_comp_Std1_Low <- tariff_Std1 %>% 
  filter(HourRate == "Low") %>% 
  mutate(forecast_actual = forecast_Std1-actual_Std1) %>% 
  filter(forecast_actual > -1) # remove outliers

tariff_comp_Std2_Low <- tariff_Std2 %>% 
  filter(HourRate == "Low") %>% 
  mutate(forecast_actual = forecast_Std2-actual_Std2)

tariff_comp_ToU1_Low <- tariff_ToU1 %>% 
  filter(HourRate == "Low") %>% 
  mutate(forecast_actual = forecast_ToU1-actual_ToU1)

tariff_comp_ToU2_Low <- tariff_ToU2 %>% 
  filter(HourRate == "Low") %>% 
  mutate(forecast_actual = forecast_ToU2-actual_ToU2)

ggplot() +
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_Std1_Low,
               aes(x = forecast_actual, color = "Std1"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_Std2_Low,
               aes(x = forecast_actual, color = "Std2"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_ToU1_Low,
               aes(x = forecast_actual, color = "ToU1"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_ToU2_Low,
               aes(x = forecast_actual, color = "ToU2"), alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Tariff Type",
    values = c(
      "Std1" = "goldenrod1",
      "Std2" = "red",
      "ToU1" = "darkgreen",
      "ToU2" = "blue"
    )
  )+
  xlab("Forecasted - Actual Demand")+
  ggtitle("Forecasted Versus Actual Demand During Low Tariff Hours, 2013")
```


```{r}
#Normal

tariff_comp_Std1_Normal <- tariff_Std1 %>% 
  filter(HourRate == "Normal") %>% 
  mutate(forecast_actual = forecast_Std1-actual_Std1) %>% 
  filter(forecast_actual > -1) # remove outliers

tariff_comp_Std2_Normal <- tariff_Std2 %>% 
  filter(HourRate == "Normal") %>% 
  mutate(forecast_actual = forecast_Std2-actual_Std2)

tariff_comp_ToU1_Normal <- tariff_ToU1 %>% 
  filter(HourRate == "Normal") %>% 
  mutate(forecast_actual = forecast_ToU1-actual_ToU1)

tariff_comp_ToU2_Normal <- tariff_ToU2 %>% 
  filter(HourRate == "Normal") %>% 
  mutate(forecast_actual = forecast_ToU2-actual_ToU2)

std1<- ggplot()+
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_Std1, aes(x = forecast_actual, color = HourRate), alpha = 0.5)+
  xlab("Forecasted - Actual Demand")+
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Tariff Type",
    values = c(
      "Normal" = "goldenrod1",
      "High" = "red",
      "Low" = "darkgreen"))+
  ggtitle("Std1")+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

std2<- ggplot()+
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_Std2, aes(x = forecast_actual, color = HourRate), alpha = 0.5)+
  xlab("Forecasted - Actual Demand")+
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Tariff Type",
    values = c(
      "Normal" = "goldenrod1",
      "High" = "red",
      "Low" = "darkgreen"))+
  ggtitle("Std2")+ theme(legend.position = "none")


tou1<- ggplot()+
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_ToU1, aes(x = forecast_actual, color = HourRate), alpha = 0.5)+
  xlab("Forecasted - Actual Demand")+
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Tariff Type",
    values = c(
      "Normal" = "goldenrod1",
      "High" = "red",
      "Low" = "darkgreen"))+
  ggtitle("ToU1")+ theme(legend.position = "none")

tou2<- ggplot()+
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_ToU2, aes(x = forecast_actual, color = HourRate), alpha = 0.5)+
  xlab("Forecasted - Actual Demand")+
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Tariff Type",
    values = c(
      "Normal" = "goldenrod1",
      "High" = "red",
      "Low" = "darkgreen"))+
  ggtitle("ToU2")+ theme(legend.position = "none")

legend<- ggplot()+
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_Std1, aes(x = forecast_actual, color = HourRate), alpha = 0.5)+
  xlab("Forecasted - Actual Demand")+
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Tariff Type",
    values = c(
      "Normal" = "goldenrod1",
      "High" = "red",
      "Low" = "darkgreen"))+
  ggtitle("Std1")+
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

legend <- get_legend(legend)

cowplot::plot_grid(
  plot_grid(std1,std2,tou1,tou2, ncol = 2),
  legend,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights=c(1,0.1))

# Add caption and title
```

```{r}
std1 <- ggplot() +
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_Std1_Normal,
               aes(x = forecast_actual), alpha = 0.5, color = "goldenrod1") +
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_Std1_Low,
               aes(x = forecast_actual), alpha = 0.5, color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_Std1_high,
               aes(x = forecast_actual), alpha = 0.5, color = "red") +
  xlab("Forecasted - Actual Demand")+
  ggtitle("Std1")

std2 <- ggplot() +
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_Std2_Normal,
               aes(x = forecast_actual), alpha = 0.5, color = "goldenrod1") +
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_Std2_Low,
               aes(x = forecast_actual), alpha = 0.5, color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_Std2_high,
               aes(x = forecast_actual), alpha = 0.5, color = "red") +
  xlab("Forecasted - Actual Demand")+
  ggtitle("Std2")


tou1 <- ggplot() +
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_ToU1_Normal,
               aes(x = forecast_actual), alpha = 0.5, color = "goldenrod1") +
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_ToU1_Low,
               aes(x = forecast_actual), alpha = 0.5, color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_ToU1_high,
               aes(x = forecast_actual), alpha = 0.5, color = "red") +
  xlab("Forecasted - Actual Demand")+
  ggtitle("ToU1")

tou2 <- ggplot() +
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_ToU2_Normal,
               aes(x = forecast_actual), alpha = 0.5, color = "goldenrod1") +
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_ToU2_Low,
               aes(x = forecast_actual), alpha = 0.5, color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_density(data = tariff_comp_ToU2_high,
               aes(x = forecast_actual), alpha = 0.5, color = "red") +
  xlab("Forecasted - Actual Demand")+
  ggtitle("ToU2")

cowplot::plot_grid(std1,std2,tou1,tou2)
```
